content: Hi there, I'm planning to write a driver for the goodix gtx8 touchscreens and ak09970n magnetometer. My device has both of them connected via i2c and needs to interact with GPIOs to turn them on. I see that there is some very basic support for i2c in https://github.com/nyantec/linux/commits/rust-i2c, but for GPIO i can only find commits from 2021 on the old rust branch, which probably isn't supposed to be cherry-picked from. What's the status on these and are there maybe up-to-date commits I could pick to start writing these drivers? I'm on linux-next already so I have no issues picking something that's in for-next :)
It's fine and actually encouraged to cherry-pick from the rust branch
Although most won't apply cleanly so you'd need to adapt them
